subcodes.first_line: O ye believers of God, and the friends of the Merciful! By the blowing of the furious gales of trials and ordeal the people, like unto the leaves of the trees, are falling to the ground
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی ای یاران رحمانی در این سنه امتحانات الهی احاطه نموده شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
